scope: Live single-role click-through performed by agent as the currently-logged-in platform_admin in the preview session. compliance_analyst and requester/trader roles remain OPERATOR-VERIFY-REQUIRED — agent cannot sign in/out of preview session as other identities without hijacking the user's session.

method_disclosure.platform_admin: LIVE — driven via browser tool against /hq/facilitation with the user's currently-logged-in platform_admin account. Screenshots captured.
method_disclosure.compliance_analyst: NOT-EXECUTED-LIVE — agent has no separate credentials and will not impersonate by sign-in/out in the user's preview session. Code-level RBAC + RLS evidence retained from prior pass.
method_disclosure.requester_trader: NOT-EXECUTED-LIVE — same reason. Code-level RLS evidence retained from prior pass.

platform_admin_live_observations.access_hq_facilitation: PASS (live) — /hq/facilitation rendered with FACILITATION · PHASE 1 QUEUE + PHASE 2 OUTREACH header and 6 cases visible (FAC-2026-000001..000006). Screenshot: 01-platform-admin-hq-facilitation.png.
platform_admin_live_observations.queue_row_opens_drawer: PASS (live) — clicking a row opens the case drawer with Triage + Outreach tabs. Screenshot: 02-platform-admin-case-drawer-triage.png.
platform_admin_live_observations.outreach_tab_renders: PASS (live) — Candidates (0), Add candidate form (Counterparty org / Contact email / Contact name / Source note), and pre-send check explanation are present. Screenshot: 03-platform-admin-case-drawer-outreach.png.
platform_admin_live_observations.templates_panel_renders: PASS (live) — 'Outreach email templates' card with empty state 'No templates available.' rendered below queue. Plain-English helper copy present. Screenshot: 04-platform-admin-templates-and-dnc-panels.png.
platform_admin_live_observations.dnc_panel_renders: PASS (live) — 'Do-not-contact rules' card with Add rule form (What to block / Value / Reason / Add rule) and 'No do-not-contact rules.' empty state. Helper copy is plain English. Screenshot: 04-platform-admin-templates-and-dnc-panels.png.
platform_admin_live_observations.previous_emb_fixes_visually_clean: PASS (live) — no raw enum codes, no edge-function slugs, and no 'non-2xx' strings observed on the rendered surfaces.

newly_observed_defects.observed: Drawer subtitle exposed internal role tokens: 'Admin triage · Phase 2 outreach surface (platform_admin / compliance_analyst)'.
newly_observed_defects.applied_fix: Replaced with 'Review the case and run outreach'. Re-screenshot required after rebuild.

could_not_exercise_in_live_session: approve/archive template — no templates seeded in current preview data
add candidate end-to-end (gate result green/warning/block) — requires test counterparty + template
warn-ack-then-send + duplicate-send guard — depends on a real send with a seeded template
open escalation + send-blocked-while-open — depends on a sent outreach + escalation row
add DNC rule end-to-end — agent did not commit destructive writes against the user's live preview org without explicit go-ahead

compliance_analyst_journey.method: Code-level RBAC + UI gating inspection only (unchanged from prior pass).

requester_milestone_privacy.method: Code + RLS inspection only (unchanged from prior pass).

remaining_blockers.check: no internal role tokens / architecture copy visible to operators
remaining_blockers.evidence: Live observation of case drawer subtitle exposing 'platform_admin / compliance_analyst'. Patched at src/components/facilitation/FacilitationCaseDrawer.tsx:133.
Agent does not have a compliance_analyst test account and will not hijack the user's preview session.
remaining_blockers.smallest_safe_fix: Operator (or QA with provisioned @test.izenzo.co.za accounts) executes compliance-analyst-checklist.md against /hq/facilitation in a clean browser session.
Operator executes the requester privacy checks against a real raised case and captures the rendered milestone page.

remaining_blockers.check: Live end-to-end platform_admin actions: approve/archive template, add candidate (green/warn/block), send (with ack), duplicate-send guard, open escalation, send-blocked-while-open, add DNC rule
remaining_blockers.evidence: Code wiring verified, but destructive writes against the live preview org were not performed by the agent without seeded fixtures and explicit go-ahead.
remaining_blockers.smallest_safe_fix: Operator runs platform-admin-checklist.md against a seeded test case + template and captures the gate-result screenshots.

verdict_reason: Live single-role pass confirms the platform_admin UI surfaces render cleanly with the prior EMB-1..EMB-4 cosmetic fixes applied, but: (1) one new internal-copy leak (EMB-5) was found and patched in this pass and needs a re-screenshot; (2) destructive platform_admin actions were not exercised live; (3) compliance_analyst and requester/trader live click-through was not executed by the agent and remains operator-driven.
